subject: fix(pwa): remove standalone gate from all version.json checks
body:
The initial load, hourly interval, and manual checkForUpdates() all
gated version.json checks behind display-mode: standalone, which can
fail on some browsers/platforms. Removed the gate entirely since
checkVersionJson() is harmless for browser users (stores a buildTime
in localStorage) and the render condition (isInstalled && hasUpdate)
already prevents showing the update button to non-PWA users.

Also removed standalone gate from the forced SW update check on launch
since it's a lightweight no-op when there's no new SW to detect.

Tags: pwa, bugfix, update-detection
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa-updates
Semver: patch

title: remove standalone gate from all version.json checks
